summary: Most requested content simplifications appear implemented across the specified renewable energy pages, and a new BiofuelsProcessDiagram component was added and imported into BiofuelsPage. However, the diff for BiofuelsPage is truncated before the end, so placement of the new diagram at the bottom using the required wrapper pattern cannot be verified. Additionally, non-requested metadata/documentation files were modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Render the new Biofuels process diagram at the bottom of the Biofuels page content (after existing sections) using the existing pattern: a `div` with `className="not-prose my-8"`.
missing_requirements.reason: BiofuelsPage.tsx diff is truncated before the bottom of the page, and the required wrapper `div className="not-prose my-8"` rendering placement is not visible/confirmable from provided evidence.

hallucinated_features.description: Updated project metadata/state file (project_state.json) unrelated to the requested page text simplification and diagram addition.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest focuses on rewriting paragraph text on specific pages and adding a Biofuels diagram component; it does not request changes to project_state.json.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified frontend-file-summaries.txt (documentation/summary artifact) not requested in the BuildRequest.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest contains no requirement to update repository summary/documentation files.
